title: Early Childhood Education Director
notes: Director position listed as TBD. Early childhood preschool office located at Fruitland Elementary. Contact Head Start at 503-399-5510 for more information.

title: Executive Director of Elementary Programs
notes: Karen Rush hired as Executive Director of Elementary Programs starting November 4, 2024. Previously worked at North Clackamas School District as director of early learning. Email format appears to be k[something]@bend.k12.or.us but not confirmed. Also serves as Director of Educational Technology. 25 years of experience in elementary education and nonprofits.

title: Preschool Coordinator
notes: Kendall Palmer is Preschool Coordinator/High School Instructor. M.Ed. in Early Childhood and Curriculum Development & Educational Leadership from Concordia University. Early Learning Center located at 14211 SE Johnson Rd, Milwaukie, OR 97267.

title: Early Childhood Programs Director
notes: Director position not yet identified. Staff directory searchable at directory.4j.lane.edu. Contact HR at hr@4j.lane.edu for current early childhood director information.

title: Early Childhood/Preschool Director
notes: District office at 640 A Street, Springfield, OR 97477. Early childhood programs include Head Start, KITS (Kids in Transition to School), and Thurston High School Child Development Center. No dedicated early childhood director identified yet.

title: Director of Early Learners
notes: Dana Stiles is Director of Early Learners. Early Learners Department located at 4803 NE 7th Ave, Portland, OR 97211. Contact: prekprograms@pps.net. Recent LinkedIn activity suggests possible role change to Chief Development Officer at Council of Chief State School Officers.

title: Early Learning Director/Coordinator
notes: District has Early Childhood Care Provider positions and early learning programs. No dedicated early learning director identified. Contact HR at 503-356-4500 for current early learning leadership information.

title: Director of Federal Programs
notes: Olga Acuña is Director of Federal Programs overseeing Title I, preschool, and early learning programs. Ph.D. earned. Nearly 40 years experience. Received 2026 Lau Leadership Impact Award. Expanded district's preschool offerings and family engagement programs.

title: Director of Federal Programs
notes: Dr. Erin Shepherd is Director of Federal Programs overseeing K-12 education and program administration including early learning. Ed.D. degree. Previously served as K-5 District Instructional Coach. Also listed is Judith Bracamontes as program coordinator for Child Development Center.

title: Early Learning Manager
notes: Kristina Kurtz, MSEd is Early Learning Manager. Contact available at earlylearning.ttsdschools.org/about-us/contact. District offers dual-language Preschool Promise classrooms and inclusive preschool program.
